entity.label: Narcissus
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Daffodil, a Roman whom Paul salutes (Rom. 16:11). He is supposed to have been the private secretary of the emperor Claudius. This is, however, quite uncertain.

nodes.label: Narcissus
nodes.description: Daffodil, a Roman whom Paul salutes (Rom. 16:11). He is supposed to have been the private secretary of the emperor Claudius. This is, however, quite uncertain.

verses.text: Salute Herodion my kinsman. Greet them that be of the household of Narcissus, which are in the Lord.
